meta.title: How To PCS Overseas | Tips to Help You Thrive At Your New Host Base
meta.description:
Have you just received PCS orders for overseas? Moving overseas to a foreign country can be overwhelming. Here are some tips to help you thrive at your next base.

Learn more about PCSing:
https://www.sandboxx.us/?s=pcs

0:00 Intro
1:14 Apps To Download
2:54 Use Social Media To Connect
5:22 Use Base Resources 
7:06 Additional Tips
